use std::sync::OnceLock;

struct MetricsClient {
    endpoint: String,
}

fn init_metrics() -> MetricsClient {
    MetricsClient {
        endpoint: "https://metrics.example.com".to_string(),
    }
}

// BAD: optional crate initialization runs on default path
static METRICS: OnceLock<MetricsClient> = OnceLock::new();

fn get_metrics() -> &'static MetricsClient {
    METRICS.get_or_init(|| init_metrics())
}

async fn handle_request() {
    let metrics = get_metrics();
    // even if metrics feature is disabled at runtime, init runs
}
